chunithm.message.b30.text_prompt: Here is the Best 30 list of ${user} (Rating ${rating}):
maimai.help.alias: Query the alias of the song.
maimai.help.b50: Query the Best 50 list of Maimai player.
maimai.help.base: Search for songs by chart constant or range of the constants.
maimai.help.calc: Calculate Rating based on the chart constant.
maimai.help.chart: Query chart info, for chart ID then add prefix 'id'.
maimai.help.grade: Query the 段位認定 (Course) list.
maimai.help.id: Query song or chart info by ID.
maimai.help.new: View the latest songs in the current version.
maimai.help.option.p: Specify the number of pages, default is 1.
maimai.help.score: Query play record of charts, if by ID add prefix 'id'.
maimai.help.search: Search for songs by (part of the) name.
maimai.message.alias.file_not_found: Alias file not found. Please initialize by "${prefix}maimai update".
maimai.message.b50.text_prompt: Here is the Best 50 list of ${user} (Rating ${rating}):

maimai.message.disambiguation.song.promp: Use "${prefix}maimai song <ID>" to query the exact result.
